name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state


Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "idle"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
       \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "trying"
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
       \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "critical"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state>>
====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, FiniteSubsets

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

TypeOK ==
  /\ participants \in FiniteSubsets(N)
  /\ coordinator \in N
  /\ messages \in FiniteSubsets({[sender \in N, receiver \in N, type \in {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]})

Init ==
  /\ participants = {}
  /\ coordinator = 1
  /\ messages = {}

Next ==
  \/ /\ participants = {}
     /\ \E p \in N \setminus {coordinator}
        /\ participants' = {p}
        /\ messages' = messages \cup {[sender |-> coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> "Prepare"]} \setminus messages
  \/ /\ participants # {}
     /\ \E p \in participants :
        /\ messages' = messages \cup {[sender |-> p, receiver |-> coordinator, type |-> "VoteYes"]} \setminus messages
     \/ /\ \E p \in participants :
        /\ messages' = messages \cup {[sender |-> p, receiver |-> coordinator, type |-> "VoteNo"]} \setminus messages
     \/ /\ \E p \in participants :
        /\ messages' = messages \cup {[sender |-> coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> "Commit"]} \setminus messages
     \/ /\ \E p \in participants :
        /\ messages' = messages \cup {[sender |-> coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> "Abort"]} \setminus messages
  \/ /\ participants # {}
     /\ messages' = messages

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state



Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -> FALSE]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> -> "thinking"]

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "thinking"
          /\ forks[i] = FALSE
          /\ forks[NextFork(i)] = FALSE
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE, ![NextFork(i)] = TRUE]
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE, ![NextFork(i)] = FALSE]
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

NextFork(i) == IF i < N THEN i + 1 ELSE 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ state \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

(* --algorithm Bakery
actions
  choose(i) == 



  wait(i) == 
    \E j \in 1..N : j # i /\ flag[j] /\ (num[j] < num[i] \/ (num[j] = num[i] /\ j < i))
  enter(i) == 

  exit(i) == 

  Next == \E i \in 1..N : choose(i) \/ wait(i) \/ enter(i) \/ exit(i)
*)

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] := TRUE
          /\ num[i] := 1 + Max(Seq(num))
          /\ flag[i] := FALSE
        \/ \E j \in 1..N :
              /\ j # i
              /\ flag[j]
              /\ (num[j] < num[i] \/ (num[j] = num[i] /\ j < i))
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
              /\ flag[i] := TRUE
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
              /\ num[i] := 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count, item

(* q is a sequence of length K, holding the queue contents *)
(* head and tail are indices into q *)
(* count is the number of items in the queue *)

TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
    /\ head \in 1..K
    /\ tail \in 1..K
    /\ count \in 0..K

Init == 
    /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
    /\ head = 1
    /\ tail = 1
    /\ count = 0

Enqueue(item) == 
    /\ count < K
    /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = item]
    /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
    /\ count' = count + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<head, q>>

Dequeue == 
    /\ count > 0
    /\ item' = q[head]
    /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
    /\ count' = count - 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<tail, q>>

Next == 
    \/ Enqueue(item)
    \/ Dequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Servers

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state



TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in {None} \cup Servers
          /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = None
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == 
  (* Candidate wins if majority of votes *)
  \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
     /\ currentTerm = currentTerm + 1
     /\ votedFor' = None
     /\ state' = "Leader"
  \/ /\ state = "Follower"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
     /\ votedFor' = votedFor
     /\ state' = "Follower"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
